findings.message: Authentication system requires penetration testing plan
findings.recommendation: Add security testing requirements to acceptance criteria. Consider OWASP Authentication Cheat Sheet.

compliance_frameworks.SOC2: CC6.1 - Logical and Physical Access Controls
compliance_frameworks.ISO27001: A.9.4 - System and application access control

findings.message: PII detected - user email and profile data requires data classification

location.text: Store user email, name, and profile preferences

findings.recommendation: Document data retention policy and user data deletion procedures

compliance_frameworks.GDPR: Article 5 - Principles relating to processing of personal data
compliance_frameworks.ISO27001: A.18.1.4 - Privacy and protection of personally identifiable information

findings.message: Audit logging not mentioned for authentication events
findings.recommendation: Add requirement for audit logging of all authentication events
